process_heavy.team_structure: Operations team of 12, split across production planning, quality assurance, and logistics
process_heavy.previous_knowledge_loss: Lost a senior production planner 2 years ago — took 6 months to recover scheduling efficiency
process_heavy.immediate_risk: Production scheduling would break within 48 hours — nobody else knows the custom SAP workflows
process_heavy.undocumented_areas: Custom SAP report configurations and workaround for the batch scheduling bug
process_heavy.key_external_relationships: Primary contact for 3 key raw material suppliers
process_heavy.system_access_gaps: Admin access to SAP production module, sole owner of Power BI dashboards
process_heavy.most_important_context: The SAP system has been customised heavily and the documentation is outdated — the new person needs to understand what actually works vs what the manual says
process_heavy.success_definition_90_days: Can independently run the weekly production schedule and handle supplier order adjustments
agent_flags: WILLING LEAVER: Conversational, open tone appropriate.
OVERLAP PERIOD: Tailor handover for direct knowledge transfer during overlap.

decision_heavy.team_structure: Advisory team of 6 senior advisors, each managing their own client portfolio, reporting to a Partner
decision_heavy.role_type_weighting: 60% decision-making and judgment, 25% relationship management, 15% process
decision_heavy.immediate_risk: High-value client relationships worth approx £8M AUM have no secondary contact — clients will be nervous
decision_heavy.undocumented_areas: Client risk tolerance nuances that go beyond the recorded risk profiles
decision_heavy.key_external_relationships: 12 high-value clients, 3 platform relationship managers, FCA compliance contact
decision_heavy.system_access_gaps: Xplan admin access, DocuSign account ownership for client agreements
decision_heavy.most_important_context: Each client relationship has unwritten context — what they really want vs what their documented objectives say. The new person needs to understand the human side.
decision_heavy.success_definition_90_days: Has met all top-tier clients face to face, retained 95%+ of AUM, and is making independent portfolio recommendations
decision_heavy.confidential_sections: Client-specific financial details and personal notes
decision_heavy.sensitivity_flags: Employee is joining a competitor — avoid questions about future plans
agent_flags: WILLING LEAVER: Conversational, open tone appropriate.
LONG NOTICE PERIOD: Full deep-dive interview across all knowledge categories is appropriate.
NO REPLACEMENT OVERLAP: Emphasise documentation of decision logic and judgment — the replacement will have no one to ask.
SENSITIVE DEPARTURE: Employee joining competitor — avoid questions about future plans.

relationship_heavy.team_structure: Flat structure — 4 principals each managing client engagements, supported by a shared pool of 8 consultants
relationship_heavy.previous_knowledge_loss: A principal left last year and we lost 2 major clients within 3 months — nobody knew the relationship history
relationship_heavy.immediate_risk: 3 active client engagements worth £400K annually have no secondary relationship holder
relationship_heavy.undocumented_areas: Client preferences, informal agreements on scope flexibility, and unwritten expectations around response times
relationship_heavy.key_external_relationships: 6 active clients, 4 dormant clients likely to re-engage, 2 referral partners
relationship_heavy.system_access_gaps: HubSpot admin, shared Google Drive with client deliverables
relationship_heavy.most_important_context: The clients chose to work with us because of this person — the relationship is personal. The new person needs to earn trust quickly and not assume it transfers automatically.
relationship_heavy.success_definition_90_days: All active clients have had a face-to-face introduction, no client churn, at least one new engagement scoped
relationship_heavy.existing_template: We have a basic client handover template in Notion but it only covers active projects, not relationship context
relationship_heavy.sensitivity_flags: Involuntary departure — restructuring. Employee may be guarded. Do not reference reasons for leaving.
agent_flags: INVOLUNTARY DEPARTURE: Use a neutral, respectful tone. Do not reference the circumstances of departure.
SENSITIVE DEPARTURE: Avoid any questions that could be perceived as evaluative or critical of the company.
OVERLAP PERIOD: Tailor handover for direct knowledge transfer during overlap.
